calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Plaintiff: Franklin Mijango present in pro per was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Stephanie Perez.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 242 Broad St., Apt. A (first room on the right), San Francisco, CA. 94112
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Back due rent and damages in total of $1,965.00
Less security deposit of $ 200.00
Costs - none, for a Total of $1,765.00
Plaintiff to prepare a proposed Judgment and submitted to Dept. 514 for signature.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Franklin Mijango is not present.
Defendant Sephanie Perez is present.
Attorney John Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by plaintiff. The trial date of July-23-2012 remains on calendar. (D501)
